curl -L "https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono/raw/master/fonts/webfonts/JetBrainsMono-SemiBold.woff2" -o ~/magi-v2/frontend/shared/fonts/jetbrains-mono-600.woff2 2>&1 && \

echo "---DONE---" && ls -la ~/magi-v2/frontend/shared/fonts/

content.text:
Everything checks out. Here's the completion summary:

## ✅ Agent 1: Shared Infrastructure Overhaul — COMPLETE

### Deliverables:

1. **`/shared/core.css`** — Complete rewrite with Apex design tokens:
   - JetBrains Mono @font-face (400/500/600/700)
   - All Apex CSS variables: backgrounds (#0d121b base), cyan accent (#63ebff), text colors, borders, glass tokens, radii, fonts, motion
   - Grid texture background (replaces old orbs)
   - Cyan scrollbar styling
   - All animations: fadeIn, slideUp, staggerIn, pulse, spin, countUp
   - Stagger entry system (12 items, 50ms delay each)
   - Page transition overlay CSS (#apex-transition)
   - Page content entrance (.page-enter → .visible)

2. **`/shared/components.css`** — Full rewrite with Apex components:
   - Buttons: cyan gradient primary, secondary (subtle border), danger (red), ghost (transparent)
   - Cards: minimal, no backdrop-filter blur
   - Inputs: dark bg (rgba(0,0,0,0.3)), white border on focus
   - Badges: success/warning/danger/info pills
   - Modals: solid bg with border-strong
   - Toasts: slide up from bottom-right, colored left borders
   - Tables: minimal, border-bottom only
   - Spinner: CSS-only, cyan border
   - Toggle switch: pill-shaped, cyan when on
   - Empty state, page layout, sidebar, topbar

3. **`/shared/nav.js`** — Complete rewrite with Apex sidebar:
   - 56px collapsed → 220px on hover
   - Active item: 3px cyan left border + brighter bg
   - 4 grouped sections: CORE, OPERATIONS, BUSINESS, SYSTEM
   - Footer with MAGI logo + version
   - Mobile: hamburger + dark overlay slide-out
   - **Page transitions integrated** via `window.__apexNavTo`
   - `renderNav(activePage)` export signature preserved

4. **`/shared/transitions.js`** — NEW page transition system:
   - `initTransitions()` — creates overlay DOM, fades in page content
   - `navTo(url, icon, label)` — full transition sequence (fade out → overlay → icon → label → navigate)
   - Registered globally as `window.__apexNavTo`

5. **`/shared/countup.js`** — NEW animated number counting:
   - `initCountUp()` — finds all `[data-countup]` elements
   - IntersectionObserver triggers animation when visible
   - 800ms duration, ease-out-quart
   - Supports integers, decimals, percentages

### Verified:
- ✅ core.js NOT modified (auth, api, toast intact)
- ✅ JetBrains Mono woff2 fonts downloaded (4 weights, all valid)
- ✅ `renderNav(activePage)` signature preserved
- ✅ All CSS values match Apex spec exactly
